experiment: l3a-parse — NL-boundary leg, family/world vertical: deterministic mapper-a1-hybrid parse of blind held-out NL phrasings of the frozen l3a eval vs the measured gold-parse ceiling (HL3a clause 2)
candidate: deterministic training-free NL front-end (mapper a1-hybrid + entity gazetteer + closed frame layer) as a replacement for the gold parse on the family/world vertical — the NL-boundary rung named open by the l3a/oracle-coverage assessments and pre-declared as HL3a clause 2
_placement_note: kot-assess/1 record at registry/assessments/l3a-parse.json per the g8 / a5-llm / truthstyle-2x2 single-experiment precedent, tracked by registry/audit-status.jsonl (line reported to the coordinator for serial append; NOT written here). Paired with registry/assessments/a5-nl.json: FK-NLB-1 keeps the two verticals as SEPARATE records so the two kills fire independently; this record licenses ONLY the family/world vertical and carries the shared cross-experiment reading, which is stated identically in both. Scope discipline: this file + the ASM-0720/0721 block in registry/assumptions.jsonl ONLY; no verdict, experiment record, amendment, audit, log, or engine/instrument code touched; the concurrent knull agent (ASM-0700-0719, poc/knull, docs/next/knull-*) and g3-v3 agent (ASM-0740+) files untouched; no git/bd/kb-sync run.
assessor_binding: FABLE interpretive assessment per the kern Fable/Opus execution split: the run (Opus runner) produced only the mechanical verdict; verdict-gen graded it a pure function of the frozen SAP + chained log (FAIL, fired_rule_index 1); the instrument's own validity rests on gates G0-G7 (all green) plus four rounds of independent Codex-skeptic harness hardening (round-1 re-scope ASM-0424, round-2 ASM-0621, round-2 re-audit ASM-0624, round-3 ASM-0625). What this FAIL MEANS for the correctness thesis is decided here and only here. This record interprets; it does not grade, re-grade, or audit.

verdict_ref.audit_state: N/A — audit.path null, audit.state N/A in the verdict object. A FAIL carries no cross-vendor Gate-A upgrade requirement (the Gate-A PASS-upgrade is inapplicable to a FAIL, house discipline per the g8/a5-llm precedent). INSTRUMENT-VALID is established mechanically by G0-G7 + the four independent skeptic-hardening rounds, NOT by a verdict audit. Every [MEASURED] tag below is MEASURED (mechanically verdicted, instrument-valid); it is not verdict-audited, and that qualifier travels with any citation.

provenance_refs.results_log: results-log/l3a-parse.jsonl (mapper-parse run seq 0 + gold-replication / deranged-lexicon / abstain-all / answer-all arms; deterministic_repeat_identical true)

parent.note: gold-parse instrument-adequacy PASS (600/600 covered-exact Wilson LB 0.9955; 300/300 strict-code refusal; audit CONFIRMED). Both parent envelopes extrapolate to NO natural-language behaviour verbatim — this record tests exactly that pre-declared next stage.

scope_note: Every number below is index-bound to: kernel state kernel-v0 (8209cada) + molecules-v0 (69f0c8a3) + world-v0 (dfa51451) as frozen; ONE deterministic front-end build (mapper a1-hybrid policy sha e13dc838, one entity gazetteer, one frozen frame rule set, front-end sha 59037776 pinned BEFORE any EVAL phrasing existed); ONE blind agent-authored held-out phrasing set (K=1 per query, design-doc section-5 blind protocol); the parents' frozen eval/stores byte-identical; the engine behaviourally parent-perfect on the parent eval, re-verified IN-RUN by gate G2 (ASM-0147). Rungs measured: R0 (no host model, no GPU). Scored slice: the 7 SHAPE-RECOVERABLE IN-SCOPE families (n=527), per FK-NLB-10 / ASM-0420 — the two shape-ambiguous families (unique-maker 43, made-lookup 30) are carried descriptively in /analysis/shape_ambiguous_stratum, never gated, carved out of the envelope.
_surprise_note: No registered surprise-prior / claim.md exists for l3a-parse, so no surprise-* tag is licensed. Direction was pre-flagged: ASM-0623 (EXTRAPOLATION sizing note) declared an INCONCLUSIVE/FAIL landing live and placed the covered-exact rate 'plausibly in or below the 463-485/527 INCONCLUSIVE band' from a 28-item audit sample of natural-synonym phrasing (9/28 = 0.3214). MAGNITUDE undershot even that: measured 251/527 = 0.476 sits well BELOW the INCONCLUSIVE band (<=462/527 fires FAIL), a decisive FAIL rather than a marginal one — the single-label mapper abstained on paraphrase even harder than the sizing note extrapolated (paraphrase-stratum exact 0/261). Quotable only as planning-value context; the run supersedes the sizing note (ASM-0623 resolution path).

interpretation.headline: l3a-parse is a DECISIVE, INSTRUMENT-VALID coverage FAIL of the deterministic NL front-end on the family/world vertical, wrapped around a clean machinery PASS — and it is the SAFE kind of failure: the front-end refuses far more than it errs. Machinery leg [MEASURED]: over the SAME frozen eval queries, the gold-parse arm reproduced the parent-perfect result in-run (gold_replication_identical true; 527/527 on the in-scope slice) and the deranged-lexicon control collapsed to 0.0 (G5) — the engine, renderer, and scorer all work; the closed kot-query/1 grammar is decidable exactly as banked. NL-boundary leg [MEASURED]: routed through the deterministic a1-hybrid front-end, the same in-scope queries reach a correct, engine-answered, exact result on only 251 of 527 blind NL phrasings = 47.6% (one-sided Wilson 95% UB 0.5121 vs the frozen 0.90 retention bar), so the FAIL leg (UB <= 0.90) fires cleanly — the NL boundary eats roughly 52% of the rung. Fail-closed leg [MEASURED]: the S2 dangerous-wrong-answer KILL did NOT fire (covered wrong 8/527 = 1.5%, Wilson LB 0.0086 < the 0.02 kill floor) — mis-parses on the family/world vertical overwhelmingly become REFUSALS (268/527 refused: 212 front-end ERR_PARSE + 56 safe engine refusals), not confident wrong answers. The fail-closed contract is imperfect but holds on the safety-critical direction: the 8 wrong answers are all parent-relation mis-picks in unique-father (6) / unique-mother (2), and the S2 Holm PASS gate (needs <=4) is missed, but the dangerous-wrong KILL threshold (~16+) is not reached. Net for the correctness thesis: the deterministic training-free NL front-end does NOT survive the natural-language boundary at the tested scope on the family/world vertical, and the frozen kill routes the consequence verbatim — 'L3 waits for a better parser, not more GPU'; the indicted stage is the frame layer (frame-miss 228 dominant across the stage breakdown).
interpretation.what_this_fail_establishes: Three separable findings, each MEASURED at the frozen scope. (1) THE KERNEL'S OWN CLOSED GRAMMAR IS DECIDABLE, EXACTLY — the honest positive. The gold-replication arm reproduced 527/527 in-scope covered-exact in-run (G2), byte-identical on the deterministic repeat, and the deranged-lexicon control collapsed to 0.0 (G5): the engine's decidability is real and the eval is genuinely answerable only under correct concept binding. Nothing in this FAIL touches the engine, the closed grammar, or the parent l3a instrument-adequacy PASS. (2) THE DETERMINISTIC NL FRONT-END DOES NOT REACH THAT GRAMMAR FROM NATURAL LANGUAGE — the decisive negative. 251/527 = 47.6% covered-exact through a1-hybrid, UB 0.5121, a FAIL by a wide margin (not a near-miss). The mechanistic driver is measured and stark: the label-verbatim stratum parses at 259/339 = 76.4% but the PARAPHRASE stratum parses at 0/261 = 0.0% — the single-label-per-concept mapper with a rule lemmatizer and no synonym table (design section 3 / FK-NLB-8) abstains on essentially any phrasing that does not carry the exact relation label, and the 60-item no-label synonym probe confirms this by construction (0/60 parse-ok). This is a STRUCTURAL ceiling of the deterministic training-free front-end as instantiated, not a tuning shortfall: 'natural language' means paraphrase, and paraphrase is where it dies. (3) THE FAILURE IS SAFE ON THE FAMILY/WORLD VERTICAL — mis-parses become refusals. Covered wrong 8/527 (LB 0.0086 < 0.02): the S2 dangerous-wrong KILL did not fire, so the fail-closed contract holds on the safety-critical direction. This is the load-bearing contrast with a5-nl (code vertical), where the analogous KILL DID fire (43/855, LB 0.0394) — same front-end, opposite fail-closed outcome, because on the family/world vertical the mapper is the sole concept-binding stage and a mis-mapped concept dies at the engine as a safe refusal (no concept aliasing, ASM-0146), whereas on the code vertical the frame layer's direction table can mis-parse into a valid-but-wrong answer. The l3a fail-closed contract is imperfect in the secondary sense (8 covered wrong + 11 controls answered leave holm_s1_pass and holm_s2_pass both false), but it never crosses into the dangerous-wrong regime.
interpretation.scope_envelope: The envelope is the frozen extrapolation_envelope_verbatim, restated honestly. WHAT THIS FAIL ESTABLISHES: on the 7-family shape-recoverable in-scope slice of the closed kot-query/1 grammar (n=527, family/world vertical), the ONE pinned deterministic a1-hybrid front-end build does not retain 90% of gold-parse covered exactness from THESE blind held-out NL phrasings, and it indicts the frame stage. WHAT IT DOES NOT GENERALIZE TO: (a) it says nothing about the two shape-ambiguous families (unique-maker, made-lookup) beyond their descriptive partial-negative — MEASURED it: unique-maker 0/43 exact (43/43 refused, 0 wrong), made-lookup 8/30 exact (0 wrong); those 73 items are carved out and no whole-closed-grammar reachability claim survives; (b) NO other mapper, gazetteer, or frame build — this is an a1-hybrid-specific result and the pre-declared successor (FK-NLB-3) is an LLM-assisted parser, a DIFFERENT front-end class the kill routes investment to; (c) NO natural-user-distribution robustness claim (phrasings are agent-authored under a blind protocol, not sampled from users); NO other phrasing distribution, corpus, domain, language, or paraphrase-set-size scaling; (d) NO cross-vertical conjunction — a5-nl licenses the code vertical separately, and the two verdicts must never be pooled; (e) crucially, it does NOT indict the kernel, the engine, or the closed grammar — the gold path replicates perfectly, so this is a boundary/front-end result, not a decidability result. A scoped FAIL is not softened (47.6% with UB 0.51 is decisive) and not over-generalized (it kills the a1-hybrid front-end at this slice, not the NL boundary in principle).
interpretation.kill_chain_read: The frozen FAIL rule fired at index 1: /analysis/retained_covered_exact_wilson_ub 0.5121 <= 0.90 (the exactness leg). The SECOND disjunct — /analysis/covered_wrong_answer_wilson_lb 0.0086 >= 0.02 — did NOT fire, so the dangerous-wrong KILL is absent and this is a pure exactness FAIL. The PASS conjunction (rule 2) was unreachable on three counts: primary LB 0.4407 not > 0.90, holm_s1_pass false (control acceptable-refusal 242/270 = 89.6% below the 0.95 gate), holm_s2_pass false (8 covered wrong > the <=4 the Holm gate needs). The kill_criterion_verbatim binds the routing: 'the NL boundary eats the rung; L3 waits for a better parser, not more GPU' — investment routes to the parser stage named by the stage-breakdown (frame layer: frame-miss 228 of the 357 total ERR_PARSE, gazetteer-miss 40, mapper-abstain 48, frame-ambiguous 41), never to GPU. Clause 3 (LLM/RAG cost differentiator) belongs to l3a-cost and is not decided here.
licenses: [MEASURED] HL3a clause 2 (NL-parse leg, family/world vertical) at exactly this scope: the deterministic a1-hybrid front-end retains 251/527 = 47.6% of gold-parse covered exactness on the 7-family shape-recoverable in-scope slice (one-sided Wilson 95% LB 0.4407, UB 0.5121) vs the 0.90 retention bar — a decisive FAIL, roughly 52% of the rung lost at the NL boundary. Gold ceiling MEASURED at 527/527 in-run (retained fraction identical to absolute rate).

[MEASURED] The mechanism of the loss is paraphrase-abstention, not mis-answer: label-verbatim phrasings parse at 259/339 = 76.4% but paraphrase phrasings at 0/261 = 0.0%, and the no-label synonym probe at 0/60 parse-ok. The single-label mapper (no synonym table) is the structural ceiling; the frame stage is the dominant refuser (frame-miss 228).

[MEASURED] The fail-closed contract holds on the safety-critical direction: covered wrong 8/527 = 1.5% (Wilson LB 0.0086 < 0.02), the S2 dangerous-wrong KILL did NOT fire. Mis-parses on the family/world vertical become refusals (268/527: 212 ERR_PARSE + 56 safe engine refusals), because the mapper is the sole concept-binding stage and a mis-mapped concept dies safely at the engine (no concept aliasing, ASM-0146).

[MEASURED] The kernel's own closed grammar and engine are untouched by this FAIL: gold_replication_identical true (527/527 in-scope in-run, G2), deranged-lexicon collapse to 0.0 (G5), deterministic repeat byte-identical. The parent l3a instrument-adequacy PASS stands; this is a front-end/boundary result.

[MEASURED] Instrument discipline held end-to-end: G0-G7 all green after four independent skeptic-hardening rounds; the front-end + engine ran at ~267 microseconds/phrasing on the pinned R0 box (descriptive; no cost claim — that is l3a-cost).
does_not_license: [ENVELOPE-BOUND, verbatim] NO claim about any other front-end build. This kills the a1-hybrid deterministic training-free front-end at this slice; it does NOT establish that the NL-to-kernel boundary is unbridgeable. The pre-declared successor (FK-NLB-3, LLM-assisted parse) is a different front-end class and is exactly where the kill routes investment — an LLM parser could clear the bar this build could not, and that is untested here.

[ENVELOPE-BOUND] NO natural-user-distribution robustness claim; NO other phrasing distribution, corpus, domain, or language; NO paraphrase-set-size scaling; NO LLM-comparative accuracy or cost claim (l3a-cost); NO statement about kernel usefulness to any model. R0 throughout, 1 rung, scale language: none.

[ENVELOPE-BOUND] NO whole-closed-grammar reachability claim: the two shape-ambiguous families (unique-maker 0/43, made-lookup 8/30) are a MEASURED descriptive partial-negative, carved out of the gated slice and the envelope. The 47.6% is a 7-family in-scope figure, not a claim about the full kot-query/1 grammar.

[ENVELOPE-BOUND] NO cross-vertical conjunction. a5-nl licenses the code vertical separately, and a5-nl's fail-closed OUTCOME is the opposite (its dangerous-wrong KILL fired). Reading the two together as a single 'NL boundary FAIL' is legitimate only at the DIRECTION level (both fail the 0.90 bar); the fail-closed safety reading must stay per-vertical.

[DESIGN-BOUND] This FAIL does NOT indict the kernel content, the engine, or the closed grammar's decidability — all of which the gold-replication arm confirms sound. Any narration that reads l3a-parse as 'the kernel is wrong' is a misread: the kernel is right on its own grammar and unreachable from paraphrase through this front-end.

epistemic_promotions.claim: the deterministic a1-hybrid NL front-end retains only 47.6% of gold-parse covered exactness on the 7-family shape-recoverable in-scope l3a slice (251/527; Wilson 95% UB 0.5121 < the 0.90 bar) — decisive FAIL, family/world vertical

interpretation.cross_experiment_picture: l3a-parse and a5-nl land exactly on the programme's most consistent measured pattern, and sharpen it with a NEW axis. The pattern [reading, EXTRAPOLATION per ASM-0721, never a premise]: the kernel's deterministic machinery keeps passing ON ITS OWN CLOSED GRAMMAR / self-authored substrate, while every measured attempt to cross a boundary into real or natural input fails or is inconclusive. On the machinery side: l3a-parse & a5-nl gold-replication identical (527/527 and 855/855 in-run), g8's F/B round-trip 33/33 with live F-verification, the parent engine exactness 100% on gold [MEASURED, each in its own verdict]. On the boundary side, the measured negatives now line up on FOUR distinct boundaries: (i) the NATURAL-LANGUAGE input boundary — l3a-parse 47.6% and a5-nl 41.6%, both FAIL the 0.90 bar (THIS pair); (ii) the WILD-FORMAL-CONTENT boundary — g8 fragment 0/1000 random Mathlib at kernel size 39 (FAIL, cross-vendor CONFIRMED); (iii) the MODEL-INTERNAL-COMPUTATION boundary — nsk1 flagship INCONCLUSIVE (the internal channel DELIVERS at echo grade but INTEGRATION into free generation is unresolved at-or-below the content-free null); (iv) the COMPUTE-MATCHED VERIFIER-OFFLOAD boundary — f2 FAIL (the kernel-verifier arm did not dominate the text null / gloss-self-verify at matched budget). g7 is a formalism-capacity design selection (kot-ast/2), not a boundary result; g9-llmproxy is an early-warning FAIL-analog on the authoring lane (claims paused, HS-A unadjudicated). The ONE PASS in the neighbourhood — truthstyle-2x2 — is explicitly an INSTRUMENT-adequacy result (LLM-judge endorsement is not materially style-leaky at margin 0.10), a supporting instrument fact that makes OTHER readings trustworthy, NOT a kernel-content win. The NEW axis this pair adds: the earlier boundary negatives were about whether the kernel CONTAINS the target (coverage — g8, m0b, compression-census). l3a-parse/a5-nl show that even for content the kernel DOES contain and CAN decide perfectly under gold parse, natural language cannot reliably ADDRESS it through the pinned deterministic front-end — a reachability boundary distinct from and stacked on top of the coverage boundary. Emerging correctness picture, stated as the evidence supports it and tagged: inside the fortress the deterministic machinery is exact and sound; every measured wall between that fortress and real input is real, and this pair measures the natural-language wall at ~42-48% reach [EXTRAPOLATION synthesis, ASM-0721; each figure index-bound to its own verdict's envelope; confirmed or broken only by the pre-registered per-boundary successors].

forks_resolved.fork: H-NLB-L3 (family/world vertical): does the deterministic front-end retain >=0.90 of gold-parse covered exactness while keeping the fail-closed contract?
forks_resolved.resolution: REJECTED at envelope scope on the exactness leg: 251/527 = 47.6%, Wilson UB 0.5121 <= 0.90, FAIL fired_rule_index 1. The fail-closed contract HELD on the dangerous direction (S2 KILL did not fire, 8/527), so this is a reachability FAIL, not a safety FAIL, on this vertical.

NOT re-opened WITH DATA — the measured point 0.476 is far below the (0.80, 0.90) INCONCLUSIVE window that would re-open the fork, so the 0.90 floor stands and the landing is a clean FAIL, not an INCONCLUSIVE fork re-open (ASM-0141).

RE-OPENS by the frozen rule — the kill fires, so the LLM-assisted parse successor is now the pre-declared re-entry for the NL boundary on this vertical (a different front-end class; carries no result from this record).
HONORED as scope: gated primary + S2 scored over the 7 in-scope families (n=527); unique-maker 0/43 and made-lookup 8/30 carried descriptively, never gated, carved out of the envelope.

mechanism_state: dead-at-scope (deterministic a1-hybrid NL front-end on the family/world vertical, 0.90 bar) / alive (the kernel's closed grammar + engine — gold-replication identical; the FK-NLB-3 LLM-assisted parser re-entry is pre-registered and untested). Fail-closed contract: HELD on the dangerous direction (S2 KILL absent), imperfect on the secondary Holm gates.

questions_opened.question: The frozen kill routes here: an LLM-assisted parser (FK-NLB-3; LLM emits kot-query/1 under constrained decoding, byte-identical engine executes, abstention allowed pre-execution) on the SAME frozen eval + blind phrasings + engine, re-scoring the 0.90 retention bar and the fail-closed contract. Decides whether the NL boundary on the family/world vertical is bridgeable by a better parser or is a genuine wall. Must carry the successor-instrument repairs (extractor sens/spec gate, all-in ledger) bound by the a5-llm assessment.
blocking: any claim that the NL-to-kernel boundary is or is not bridgeable on the family/world vertical
the honest NL leg of l3a-cost

questions_opened.question: The stage indictment names the frame layer (frame-miss 228 dominant) and the single-label mapper (paraphrase 0/261). A deterministic-frontend v1 that adds a synonym/alias layer (new record id, FK-NLB-8 successor clause) would test whether the deterministic class can be rescued without an LLM — the cheaper of the two parser-investment routes the kill permits.
blocking: whether deterministic-only parsing can clear the bar with a synonym layer

_questions_note: est_cost_usd / est_agent_days are STIPULATED dry-plan estimates, never measurements. The kill permits ONLY parser-stage investment (deterministic synonym layer OR LLM-assisted parse), never GPU for this leg.

ledger_updates.statement: NL-boundary FAIL, family/world vertical (deterministic a1-hybrid front-end): 251/527 = 47.6% covered-exact (Wilson UB 0.5121 vs 0.90 retention bar), gold ceiling 527/527 in-run. Loss is paraphrase-abstention (verbatim 0.764 vs paraphrase 0.000). Fail-closed HELD on the dangerous direction (S2 KILL absent, 8/527). Kill routes to parser investment (frame stage), not GPU. INSTRUMENT-VALID (G0-G7 + four skeptic rounds); not verdict-audited.
ledger_updates.scope: l3a-parse, R0; 7-family shape-recoverable in-scope slice; a1-hybrid build; blind held-out phrasings; family/world vertical; NO cross-vertical conjunction

ledger_updates.statement: The kernel's closed grammar + engine are decidable exactly through the gold parse (gold_replication_identical, 527/527 in-scope in-run; deranged collapse 0.0). The FAIL is a front-end/boundary result and leaves the parent l3a instrument-adequacy PASS untouched.

First measurement of the NATURAL-LANGUAGE reachability boundary for the family/world vertical: even for in-grammar content the engine decides perfectly under gold parse, blind NL phrasings reach a correct exact answer through the deterministic front-end only 47.6% of the time — a reachability wall stacked on top of the coverage walls (g8/m0b). Whether a better parser lowers the wall is EXTRAPOLATION (FK-NLB-3 successor).
ledger_updates.scope: correctness thesis, NL-boundary leg; figure index-bound to this verdict's envelope

tree_impact: HL3a clause-2 NL-parse leg (family/world vertical) RESOLVED-AT-SCOPE: deterministic a1-hybrid parsing is measurably non-viable at the 0.90 retention bar (47.6%, UB 0.51), the fail-closed contract holds on the dangerous direction, and the frozen kill binds — the NL leg of l3a-cost may NOT be run on this front-end, and the FK-NLB-3 parser successor (deterministic synonym layer OR LLM-assisted parse) is the pre-registered re-entry, never GPU. The correctness thesis's NL-boundary leg on this vertical narrows to: kernel closed grammar decidable and sound (gold-replication identical), NL front-end non-viable at scope, re-entry gated on a better parser. Paired with a5-nl (code vertical, dangerous-wrong KILL fired) this establishes the natural-language reachability wall at ~42-48% across both verticals at the DIRECTION level, with per-vertical fail-closed outcomes that must not be pooled. registry/audit-status.jsonl l3a-parse flips fable_interpretive_assessed pending -> done referencing this record (line reported to the coordinator; NOT written here). Fable interpretive assessment DONE for l3a-parse.
